hero.bio: I design and code web experiences — bringing structure from project management and creativity from design to build things that feel intentional.

projects.title: EnglishGarden
projects.description: A reading companion app for English learners — track reading plans, upload books, and build vocabulary through structured daily practice. Version 1.0.0

projects.title: Connect the Dots
projects.description: A playful, interactive Valentine's experience — connect glowing dots on a canvas to reveal a hidden message and a heartfelt proposal.

projects.title: Restribo
projects.description: A professional landing page for a structural engineering consultancy — designed to convey trust, expertise, and a clear path to services.

contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? I'd love to hear from you.

footer.copy: © 2026 Juli Riveros. Designed & coded with care.

about.quote: Curiosity-first. I research, design, and execute until complexity becomes clarity.

storyLines.text: and now I build the things
